name: promo-sections-01
title: Promo Sections
author: Toby Belhome
description: “Highlight special offers, discounts, or limited-time deals with Tailwind CSS promo sections. These layouts combine bold visuals, concise messaging, and prominent calls-to-action to drive engagement and conversions. Perfect for online stores and marketplaces aiming for modern, attention-grabbing, and conversion-focused promotions.
